test_cases.title: ExtensionResolver discovers npm pi-ext packages
test_cases.description: Verify scanNpmExtensions() finds @zhushanwen/pi-goal, pi-todo, pi-workflow in node_modules
steps: assert result contains pi-goal, pi-todo, pi-workflow entries
assert each value is a directory path ending with the package name

test_cases.title: ExtensionResolver discovers bundled extensions
test_cases.description: Verify scanBundledExtensions() finds subagent, hooks, usage-tracker in dev mode
steps: assert result contains subagent, hooks, usage-tracker

test_cases.title: ExtensionResolver deduplicates npm over bundled
test_cases.description: When pi-goal exists in both npm and bundled, only npm path is returned
steps: setup: pi-goal in both npm node_modules and resources/extensions/
assert returned pi-goal path points to npm version

test_cases.title: ExtensionResolver skips shared/ directory
test_cases.description: Verify shared/ is excluded from all scan results
steps: create shared/ dir in bundled extensions path
assert shared is not in result

test_cases.title: pi receives directory paths via --extension
test_cases.description: Verify session-service passes directory (not file) paths to rpc-client
steps: mock ExtensionResolver to return directory paths
create session and capture rpc-client args
assert --extension args are directory paths without /index.ts or /index.js suffix

test_cases.title: setWidget generates extension.widget WS event
test_cases.description: When pi sends setWidget UI request, event-adapter forwards as WS event
steps: assert payload contains widgetKey and lines

test_cases.title: setStatus generates extension.status WS event AND callback
test_cases.description: When pi sends setStatus UI request, both WS event and internal callback fire

test_cases.title: setWidget no longer discarded
test_cases.description: Verify setWidget events are forwarded, not silently dropped
steps: assert event-adapter does NOT return null without action

test_cases.title: bundled goal/todo/workflow directories deleted
test_cases.description: Verify resources/pi/agent/extensions/ no longer contains goal, todo, workflow

test_cases.title: electron-builder includes pi-ext in asar unpacked
test_cases.description: After npm run build, verify pi-ext packages in app.asar.unpacked

test_cases.title: preflight-check detects missing pi-ext dist/index.js
test_cases.description: Verify preflight check fails when a pi-ext package lacks dist/index.js
steps: assert script exits with error mentioning missing dist/index.js
